title: Project Spec
description: Output of the Compose agent. Read by Verify, then by every downstream agent.

one_liner.description: Plain English. No Web3 jargon required to parse it.

feeling.description: What the product *feels like to use*. Emotional weather, not features. Specific over vague — 'a held breath at 3am' beats 'anxious'. Drives the entire downstream brand pipeline.

fetish_object.description: The single physical thing the brand returns to. Must be photograph-able or render-able. Abstract concepts disallowed.

name.description: Specific name. '1970s Bell Labs anemometer' beats 'a sensor'.

description.description: What it is, what it looks like, why it carries the brand.

rendering_hint.description: Optional cue for the marketing-image agent — material, lighting, era.

world.description: The fiction the site is set in. Not its aesthetic — its premise. The site will *be* this; it will not *describe* it.

name.description: Short name. 'A press proof', 'A doctor's clipboard', 'A control panel'.

premise.description: Two or three sentences on the world. What does the visitor step into? What conventions of that world will the site honor?

single_takeaway.description: The one thing the visitor remembers after closing the tab. Concrete enough to repeat to a friend without the URL. Generic adjectives ('clean', 'professional') invalid.

moment_of_value.description: The single moment a user feels the product was worth opening.

size_hypothesis.description: Order-of-magnitude guess at addressable users with reasoning.

wallet_role.description: What the wallet actually does in this product.

monetization.description: Optional. If present, must be a real mechanism, not 'token go up'.

shareable_surface.description: What a user shares after using it. If you cannot name one, reconsider.

external_links.description: Standard external presence — every Solana project ships with these. Web Build renders them in a way that belongs to the world (never a generic top-right nav cluster).

handle.description: Project's X/Twitter handle. Use a plausible unclaimed handle as placeholder if not yet registered.

token.description: Present only if the project has or will have an associated SPL token. Omit entirely otherwise.

address.description: Solana mint address. Use 'TBD' string if pre-launch.

kind.description: internal = built as a /docs route in this project. external = link to GitHub README, Mirror, GitBook, etc.

path_or_url.description: Either '/docs' style internal route, or full https:// URL.

open_questions.description: Things Compose deliberately deferred. Verify will weight these.
